one_line_description: Shared inbox and customer operations platform combining email, chat, and team collaboration.
auth_summary: API tokens generated from Front settings (sent as Authorization: Bearer) for single-instance integrations, plus OAuth2 which is required for public integrations distributed to all Front customers unless Front grants an exception.
access_notes: Free self-serve developer account at dev.frontapp.com provides a sandbox environment for building and testing; API tokens are generated from account settings. Publishing to the Front App Store requires building in a developer account and going through Front's partner/review process.
api_surface_summary: Core REST API covers conversations, messages, contacts, accounts, inboxes, channels, tags, comments, teammates, rules, and analytics.
agent_notes: No official MCP; Front staff acknowledged longer-term interest on their community forum but have not prioritized it. OAuth app distribution to all customers is tied to Front's app/partner review, though building and testing OAuth apps in a free developer sandbox is self-serve.
